title: RollbackRestoreRequest
description: A governed request to restore state within a declared RollbackBoundary. Requires an admitted restore admission, active authority, and before-digest evidence. Paths must remain inside safe_root.

rollback_boundary_ref.description: Ref to an existing RollbackBoundary that scopes this restore.

admission_ref.description: Ref to the RestoreAdmission artifact that admitted this request.

authority_ref.description: Ref to the authority entity permitting restore.

authority_state.description: Current state of the restore authority. Must be active for restore to proceed.

safe_root.description: Absolute path prefix. All restore_target_paths must be children of this root.

restore_target_paths.description: File/directory paths to restore. All must be descendants of safe_root.

path_allowlist.description: Optional explicit allowlist further restricting restore_target_paths.

before_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the target state before restore.

expected_after_digest.description: Expected SHA-256 digest of the restored state post-restore.
